Quentin, I'm find with this code rework also. I'd like to see Bruno comments about this patch.

Patch Set 7:

I believe, the default usage of MOUNT2 for CT has been introduced to ensure it will behave as if running on a standalone Agent/Client. And also to avoid any issue due to concurrent activity of both simple Client and Agent.You may also want to use MOUNT3 for CT, as in test_12q.

parents.subject: LU-9038 obdclass: handle early requests vs CT registering

commit.subject: LU-8911 tests: sanity-hsm test_24d fails on a local setup
commit.message:
LU-8911 tests: sanity-hsm test_24d fails on a local setup

In test_24d, do not use the default mountpoint of copytool_setup()
as it is also the one the test mounts in read-only mode.

This patch also removes:
 - the "continuing fast path" in copytool_setup (calling
   "pkill -CONT -x lhsmtool_posix" instead of launching a new
   copytool) as it is not explicitly used by any test
 - as well as the first copytool_setup located outside of any
   tests.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-hsm
Signed-off-by: Quentin Bouget <quentin.bouget@cea.fr>
